sql_array: CREATE TABLE time_slots_test (start_time DateTime, duration UInt32, size UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
UPDATE time_slots_test SET size = 3600 WHERE start_time = toDateTime('2023-01-01 10:00:00');
SELECT timeSlots(start_time, duration, size) FROM time_slots_test;
SELECT timeSlots(toDateTime64('2023-01-01 10:05:00.1234', 4), toDecimal64(3600.1, 1), toDecimal64(1800, 0)) AS scheduled_times;
